# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
Description: CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer)
Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
  
  MySubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      
  MySubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
  
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-xxxxxxx # replace with your AMI ID
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet1
      UserData: |
        #!/bin/bash
        echo "Hello, World!" > index.html
        nohup httpd -DFOREGROUND &>>/dev/null &
  
  MyRDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBName: mydb
      Engine: mysql
      InstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      AllocatedStorage: '5'
      MasterUsername: masteruser
  
  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: mys3bucket
    
  MyLoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Subnets: 
        - !Ref MySubnet1
        - !Ref MySubnet2
      SecurityGroups: 
        # replace with your security group IDs
        - sg-xxxxxxx
      Tags: 
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyLoadBalancer
